calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Sep-13-2002 Vacated

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-13-2002 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Cause assigned to Dept. 218 for settlement conference. Present: Commissioner Loretta M. Norris; Clerk: P. Dias; Reporter: Mitch L. Lyon. David G. Mendez, Esq. represented the plaintiff and Defendant Kevin Pederson appearing in pro per. The parties enter into a stipulation in settlement of the cause per the record. The court orders the trial date vacated.
